ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition entry */,
  "outlook" TEXT /* Outlook category (e.g., sunny, overcast, rainy) */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Temperature category (e.g., hot, mild, cool) */,
  "humidity" TEXT /* Humidity level (e.g., high, normal) */,
  "windy" INTEGER /* Indicates if it's windy (true or false) */,
  "wind_speed" TEXT /* Wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "precipitation" TEXT /* Precipitation level (in inches) */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility in miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recreational activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity (e.g., soccer, picnic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., team sport, individual sport, social gathering) */,
  "min_participants" INTEGER /* Minimum number of participants required */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_planning" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity being planned */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather condition for the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the planned event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., scheduled, canceled) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_planning_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_planning_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event associated with the feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "participated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user participated in the event */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES event_planning ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the user (e.g., child, adult, senior) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancellations" (
  "cancellation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event that was canceled */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation (e.g., adverse weather) */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date when the cancellation was made */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method used to notify users of cancellation (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancellation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancellations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES event_planning ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participation_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation statistic entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity type */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather condition during the activity */,
  "total_participants" INTEGER /* Total number of participants for this activity-weather combination */,
  "participant_gender" TEXT /* Distribution of participants by gender */,
  "participant_age_group" TEXT /* Distribution of participants by age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participation_stats_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participation_stats_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_category" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., team sports, individual sports) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity being mapped */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category being mapped to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES activity_category ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_category_mapping_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecast" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event being forecasted */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forecasted weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecast_forecast_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecast_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES event_planning ("event_id")
)
